Name: Ansible Tower - Run Template
Description: Run a workflow or job template in Ansible Tower

Parameters.Name: TowerServer
Parameters.Label: Tower Server
Parameters.HelpText: The connection information of the Tower server to connect to. This can be a single host name or IP (https will be assumed) or a full specification like http://localhost:8081.

Parameters.Name: TowerUsername
Parameters.Label: Tower Username
Parameters.HelpText: The user to connect to Tower as. Be sure this user has permissions to execute the Job/Workflow templates you are attempting to launch.

Parameters.Name: TowerPassword
Parameters.Label: Tower Password
Parameters.HelpText: The password for the specified user.

Parameters.Name: TowerOAuthToken
Parameters.Label: OAuth Token
Parameters.HelpText: An alternative to username/password which can be used on newer versions of Tower.

Parameters.Name: TowerJobType
Parameters.Label: Template Type
Parameters.HelpText: Select the type of template to execute. Supported template types are Workflow and Job

Parameters.Name: TowerJobTemplate
Parameters.Label: Template Name
Parameters.HelpText: The Job or Workflow template ID or name. If a name is specified the ID will attempt to be resolved.

Parameters.Name: TowerExtraVars
Parameters.Label: Extra Vars
Parameters.HelpText:
Extra variable to pass to the job. This can be either YAML or JSON.
**NOTE:** prompt on launch must be set in your template for this setting to take affect.

Parameters.Name: TowerJobTags
Parameters.Label: Job Tags
Parameters.HelpText:
Any job tags to pass to Tower. 
**NOTE:** prompt on launch must be set in your template for this setting to take affect.

Parameters.Name: TowerLimit
Parameters.Label: Limit
Parameters.HelpText:
Limit field to be passed to Tower.
**NOTE:** prompt on launch must be set in your template for this setting to take affect.

Parameters.Name: TowerInventory
Parameters.Label: Inventory
Parameters.HelpText:
The inventory for the job run.
**NOTE:** prompt on launch must be set in your template for this setting to take affect.

Parameters.Name: TowerCredential
Parameters.Label: Credential
Parameters.HelpText:
The credentials to use for this job.
**NOTE:** prompt on launch must be set in your template for this setting to take affect.

Parameters.Name: TowerImportLogs
Parameters.Label: Import Tower Logs
Parameters.HelpText: Pull the Tower logs back into the step output

Parameters.Name: TowerSecondsBetweenChecks
Parameters.Label: Second Between Checks
Parameters.HelpText: How many seconds to pause between checks when monitoring a job. 0 means no checks. Failure to parse this field as an integer will default to 3 seconds.

Parameters.Name: TowerIgnoreCert
Parameters.Label: Ignore Certificate
Parameters.HelpText: **This parameter is intended only for testing.** This tells the step to ignore any https certificate presented to it from the Tower server. Please understand the ramifications before enabling this option.

Parameters.Name: TowerVerbose
Parameters.Label: Verbose
Parameters.HelpText: Add additional details of what the plugin is doing.
